name: Walking Calori is Calculator
seo_description: Calculate calories burned walking. Free, fast and no sign-up required.
result_context: The calories vary per speed and weight; caminar fast quema ~20% more that pace moderado.
formula_display: Calori is = METs × 3.5 × weight (kg) × distance (km) ÷ speed (km/h) × 60 ÷ 200
steps: The MET determine automatically per speed
Apply formula of calories per distance
mistakes: Not considering land (subir quema 50% more that drawing)
Use speed average incorrecta (GPS can tener error)
Count solo calories of ejercicio without déficit alimenticio
desc: Free online calories burned walking. Enter weight and distance to get instant results.
